name: Manaka Ujiie
description: One of the girls who came to cheer for Aoba Johsai, especially [Oikawa](https://anilist.co/character/71611/Tooru-Oikawa), during the InterHigh Preliminary. Throughout the match, she shows that she isn't too familiar with the rules and plays of volleyball and relies on [Takinoue](https://anilist.co/character/80511/Yuusuke-Takinoue) and [Shimada](https://anilist.co/character/80513/Makoto-Shimada) to explain things to her. She would later appear during Seijoh's rematch against Karasuno.
